bird.summary: The Sao Francisco sparrow (Arremon franciscanus) is a Near Threatened species of bird in the family Passerellidae, the New World sparrows.…

locations.name: 巴伊亞州
locations.summary: 巴伊亚（葡萄牙語：Bahia）是巴西的26个州之一，地处东北部。面积565,733平方千米，首府是萨尔瓦多。巴伊亚北部是阿拉戈斯州、塞尔希培州、伯南布哥州和皮奥伊州，东部是大西洋，西部有戈亚斯州和托坎廷斯州，南部有米纳斯吉拉斯州和聖埃斯皮…

locations.name: Caatinga
locations.summary: Caatinga (; [kaaˈt͡ʃĩɡɐ]) is a type of semi-arid tropical vegetation, and an ecoregion characterized by this vegetation…

relations.subject: São Francisco sparrow
relations.evidence: The Sao Francisco sparrow is found in east-central Brazil in southern Bahia and northern Minas Gerais states

relations.subject: São Francisco sparrow
relations.evidence: It primarily inhabits the caatinga, a biome characterized by dense deciduous shrubs
